mapper.select: select id, enum_code, item_key, item_value, item_desc, sort_order, is_default, is_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_enum_item where id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update sys_enum_item
enum_code = #{enumCode},
item_key = #{itemKey},
item_value = #{itemValue},
item_desc = #{itemDesc},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
is_default = #{isDefault},
is_enabled = #{isEnabled},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update sys_enum_item set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id = #{id}

update sys_enum_item set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id in
#{id}

update.foreach:
update sys_enum_item
enum_code = #{item.enumCode},
item_key = #{item.itemKey},
item_value = #{item.itemValue},
item_desc = #{item.itemDesc},
sort_order = #{item.sortOrder},
is_default = #{item.isDefault},
is_enabled = #{item.isEnabled},
create_by = #{item.createBy},
create_time = #{item.createTime},
update_by = #{item.updateBy},
update_time = #{item.updateTime},
remark = #{item.remark},
where id = #{item.id}
